one_time_description: Blood Tribe Mismanagement of Assets Specific Claim Trust settled August 2020 resulting in total compensation from Canada of $150,000,000 (trust not consolidated in reporting entity)
economic_notes: Blood Tribe operates multiple business enterprises including agricultural project, oil and gas partnership, construction company, and marketplace. COVID-19 pandemic noted as potential risk. Mismanagement of Assets Specific Claim Trust of $150M settled August 2020 for benefit of members.
notes: Prior period restatement: Blood Tribe Mismanagement of Assets Claims Trust removed from consolidation (was included in error), reducing funds held in trust by $127,603,220. Red Crow Community College deferred revenue overstatement also corrected. Six GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: 1110340 Alberta Ltd, 1432126 Alberta Ltd, Blood Tribe Agricultural Project Ltd, Blood Tribe Oil and Gas Partnership, Kainai Housing Corporation, St. Mary's Construction Company #7 Ltd. 971445 Alberta Ltd and Kainai Marketplace Ltd transferred to consolidated entity during 2021. Tangible capital asset net book value not separately disclosed on balance sheet face; equity in tangible capital assets shown as $140,507,471 in accumulated surplus note. Annual debt service shown is 2022 scheduled principal repayment. Blood Indian Band Housing Society not in compliance with CMHC replacement reserve requirements. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + CMHC + Tribal Council + Federal/Provincial + Other Government funding.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
